body: Dual-plane authority resolution ready for website/graph integration. Operator initiated authority contradiction resolved: initiation authority (operator) vs execution authority (constitution). Website-ready draft saved. See artifact for full spec.

convergence_gate.claim: Authority contradiction resolved by dual-plane model: operator holds initiation authority, constitution holds execution authority for state-changing actions.

notes: Library typically runs 3-6 hour sessions. Handoff queued for next Library activation.

_lane_worker.detail: Missing required field: schema_version; Missing required field: task_id; Missing required field: idempotency_key; Missing required field: subject; Missing required field: payload; Missing required field: execution; Missing required field: lease; Missing required field: retry; Missing required field: evidence; task_kind is required for task/response/escalation/handoff messages
